context: Cause:  chronic urethritis from venereal disease (25-44%) + urethral strictures (50-88%) √  urethral stricture Site:   @ Prostatic urethra (10%): TCC (90%) > squamous cell ca. (10%) @   Bulbomembranous urethra (60%): squamous cell ca. (80%) > TCC (10%) > adenocarcinoma + undifferentiated carcinoma (10%) @   Penile urethra (30%): squamous cell ca. (90%) > TCC (10%) Histo: Stage I:   confined to subepithelial connective tissue Stage II:   invasion of corpus spongiosum / prostate / periurethral muscle Stage III:   invasion of corpus cavernosum + bladder neck beyond prostatic capsule Stage IV:   i
